title: Rent-A-Girlfriend Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/lHYFAw6.png)** **It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.** **This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Rent-A-Girlfriend". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container. The palette that I choose is Dark Blue & Red but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like White & Black or any colors else.** ****Check out the Discord server. where you can suggest and vote for the next pack , as well as participate in anime discussion. I will also being doing Discord nitro giveaways every** **month, You** **can find a link down below**** **please tell me I will think about it!** **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** **Updated for 1.20.1** **Visual Updates Includes:** - Adding pink boarders - New Pictures to containers - Coloring the Minecraft Logo [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Images** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/B04ZDy6.jpg)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252flistarmc.com%252fpacks%252fDoki-Doki-Literature-Club!-Custom-GUI-Pack) **Hud** ![](https://i.imgur.com/RntkPag.png) **Settings** **![](https://i.imgur.com/4bXr4fT.png)** **Creative Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/cfCHKGi.png)** **Anvil** **![](https://i.imgur.com/W8Tl1Lr.png)** **Crafting Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/R8BrOSO.png)** **Smithing Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/M2vcq9J.png)** **Furnace** **![](https://i.imgur.com/Yv6SrRf.png)** **Brewing Stand** **![](https://i.imgur.com/hJ8wxr3.png)** ****Enchantment** Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/o50hteq.png)** **Shulker Box** **![](https://i.imgur.com/QfLxqIV.png)** ****Cartography** Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/hs4Dxej.png)** ****Dispenser**** **![](https://i.imgur.com/cgvqdoF.png)** **Loom** **![](https://i.imgur.com/DokXhoW.png)** **Grinding Stone** **![](https://i.imgur.com/sNP4Uhn.png)** **Beacon Menu** **![](https://i.imgur.com/5KUaH5U.png)** **Villager Trading Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/sWwqc0D.png) [**![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
